positive: Stylized minimalist illustration of a majestic, deep-sea bioluminescent jellyfish hovering above an intricate tropical coral reef structure. The jellyfish should have flowing, ethereal tentacles radiating in complementary blues, purples, and electric turquoise. The coral reef should be rendered in strong silhouettes and rich greens and deep indigos, highlighting the contrast between the glowing subject and the darker background. Use a clean, graphic, symmetrical composition suitable for a centered T-shirt print. High contrast, vibrant, kawaii aesthetic, vector art style, 8k print quality, clean lines, no gradients.
